question: Tell me Daily/weekly/Monthly summary for DT meter (DT meter ID) for today/yesterday/Week period/Month period. This query should include summaries from Interval data, Event data. Summaries like Peak Load, Avg Load with time or time range, Event with severity and category, counts and minutes for which event was there.  \set dt_meter_id  'DEV-001' \set period_type  'LAST_MONTH'  -- period_type options: --   'TODAY' | 'YESTERDAY' | 'THIS_WEEK' | 'LAST_WEEK' | 'THIS_MONTH' | 'LAST_MONTH'
sql:
SELECT event_category, event_severity, COUNT(*) AS event_count, SUM(duration_minutes) AS total_duration
FROM event_data
WHERE dt_meter_id = 'DEV-001' AND timestamp >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE - interval '1 month') AND timestamp < date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE)
GROUP BY event_category, event_severity
ORDER BY event_category, event_severity;
